home_subtitle: Your journey to beautiful experiences starts here.
modal_subtitle: Share this link with your friends or devices
release_notes_welcome_text: BlossomOS is a beautiful, modern operating system designed for an elegant user experience. This is our first alpha release, and we're excited to share it with you!
release_notes_feature_1: Modern, beautiful and clean desktop environment
release_notes_feature_3: Beautiful default theme and icon set
release_notes_issue_1: The installer and postinstall is still a work in progress
release_notes_issue_2: Reinstalling and keeping files with multiple users is not supported yet
release_notes_issue_3: A lot of features are still not localized
release_notes_issue_5: Some hardware configurations may not yet be fully tested
release_notes_improvement_1: Enhanced installer with better design and more features
release_notes_improvement_2: Ability to choose browser and apps in postinstall
release_notes_improvement_3: All new app store with a wide selection of applications
release_notes_support_text: Please refer to our documentation for installation instructions. If you encounter any issues, please report them on our community forum or GitHub.
